channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: OpenAI and SoftBank announce artificial intelligence joint venture
item.description: Japanese technology giant SoftBank Group and OpenAI stepped up their AI partnership Monday, setting up a 50-50 held company called SB OpenAI Japan.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fast Company

item.title: Linux Foundation’s L3AF brings zero-downtime updates to eBPF network management
item.description: A challenge for enterprises that operate large-scale network infrastructure has long been how to maintain performance while updating critical systems.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: VPN usage skyrockets in DR Congo amid TikTok and X shutdown
item.description: Proton VPN recorded a 7000% increase in sign-ups above baseline as citizens are looking for ways to evade restrictions. Here's all we know so far.
item.dc:creator: chiara.castro@futurenet.com (Chiara Castro), TechRadar

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates explores the making of his internal operating system in new memoir
item.description: As he prepares to turn 70 later this year, Microsoft founder Bill Gates' new memoir explores how his childhood quirks, upbringing, friendships and experiences coalesced into shaping his internal operating system.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: The Gates Interview: A Conversation on Vaccine Conspiracy Theories, Intel's Struggles, and Google's Antitrust Challenges
item.description: Bill Gates sat down with The Associated Press to discuss his new memoir, vaccine conspiracy theories, Intel's struggles, and Google's antitrust challenges. Read the full interview here.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: China Unveils CR450 Bullet Train Prototype: A New Era in High-Speed Rail Travel
item.description: China's latest high-speed rail technology, the CR450 bullet train prototype, has been unveiled in Beijing, setting new standards for speed and efficiency.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Apple's iOS vulnerability exposes iPhones to stealthy hacker attacks
item.description: Hackers sometimes find ways to exploit iPhones, and Apple recently discovered a vulnerability in iOS that may have been exploited for over a year.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texas governor orders ban on DeepSeek, RedNote for government devices
item.description: AUSTIN, Texas (AP) — Texas Republican Gov. Greg Abbott issued a ban on Chinese artificial intelligence company DeepSeek for government-issued devices, becoming the first state to restrict the popular chatbot in such a manner.
item.dc:creator: NADIA LATHAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: OpenAI unleashes o3-mini reasoning model
item.description: OpenAI on Friday released the latest model in its reasoning series, o3-mini, both in ChatGPT and its application programming interface (API). It had been in preview since December 2024.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Browser Use: An open-source AI agent to automate web-based tasks
item.description: Author’s note: The generative AI revolution has sparked an explosion of open-source tools that fundamentally transform how developers build and deploy AI-powered applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Verizon brings AI suite to enterprise infrastructure customers
item.description: Verizon Business has launched AI Connect, an integrated suite of products designed to let businesses deploy generative artificial intelligence (AI) workloads at scale.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Did DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make new AI chatbot? Trump adviser thinks so
item.description: Did the upstart Chinese tech company DeepSeek copy ChatGPT to make the artificial intelligence technology that shook Wall Street this week? That's what ChatGPT maker OpenAI is suggesting, along with U.S. President Donald Trump's top AI adviser.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: General purpose AI could lead to array of new risks, experts say in report ahead of AI summit
item.description: LONDON (AP) — Advanced artificial intelligence systems have the potential to create extreme new risks, such as fueling widespread job losses, enabling terrorism or running amok, experts said in a first-of-its-kind international report Wednesday cataloging the range of dangers posed by the technology
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, Fox 5
